mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.company_name as seller_company_name FROM tb_product p LEFT JOIN tb_company c ON p.seller_company_id = c.company_id WHERE p.product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_product ( tenant_id, seller_company_id, product_code, product_name, item_kind, processing_type, tax_category, unit_name, sale_status, description, image_url, supply_price, vat_amount, sale_price, sale_start_at, sale_end_at, display_order, md_comment, summary, is_new, is_monthly, is_hidden, stock_manage_yn, safety_stock_qty, delivery_fee, created_by ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{sellerCompanyId}, #{productCode}, #{productName}, #{itemKind}, #{processingType}, #{taxCategory}, #{unitName}, #{saleStatus}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{supplyPrice}, #{vatAmount}, #{salePrice}, #{saleStartAt}, #{saleEndAt}, #{displayOrder}, #{mdComment}, #{summary}, #{isNew}, #{isMonthly}, #{isHidden}, #{stockManageYn}, #{safetyStockQty}, #{deliveryFee}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_product SET product_name = #{productName}, item_kind = #{itemKind}, processing_type = #{processingType}, tax_category = #{taxCategory}, unit_name = #{unitName}, sale_status = #{saleStatus}, description = #{description}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, supply_price = #{supplyPrice}, vat_amount = #{vatAmount}, sale_price = #{salePrice}, sale_start_at = #{saleStartAt}, sale_end_at = #{saleEndAt}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, md_comment = #{mdComment}, summary = #{summary}, is_new = #{isNew}, is_monthly = #{isMonthly}, is_hidden = #{isHidden}, stock_manage_yn = #{stockManageYn}, safety_stock_qty = #{safetyStockQty}, delivery_fee = #{deliveryFee} WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT image_id, product_id, image_type, image_url, sort_order, use_yn, created_at FROM tb_product_image WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, image_id ASC
SELECT related_product_id FROM tb_product_relation WHERE base_product_id = #{productId} AND relation_kind = 'RAW_TO_PROCESS_SERVICE' AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, relation_id ASC

SELECT pp.*, ch.channel_name, c.company_name as buyer_company_name FROM tb_product_price pp LEFT JOIN tb_channel ch ON pp.channel_id = ch.channel_id LEFT JOIN tb_company c ON pp.buyer_company_id = c.company_id WHERE pp.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY pp.effective_from DESC
